holdings.infoBox: XLE is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 21.69%, Chevron at 16.59%, ConocoPhillips at 6.75%, SLB N.V. at 4.67%, and The Williams Companies at 4.39%.

overview.description: The State Street Energy Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Energy Select Sector index, a market-cap-weighted index of US energy companies in the S&P 500. XLE was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
